provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Acquisition of Francistown Act.

provisions.title: Areas of Francistown vested in State
provisions.content:
2. Areas of Francistown vested in State
The ownership of all land in the Francistown Township described more fully in Schedule A hereto shall, other than land described in Schedule B hereto, vest in the State absolutely.

provisions.title: Areas of Tatitown vested in State
provisions.content:
3. Areas of Tatitown vested in State
Notwithstanding the provisions of section 2, the ownership of land described more fully in Schedule C hereto shall vest in the State absolutely.
